hero.headline: Four Decades of Landscapes Built to Last
hero.subheadline: Your property deserves more than a mow-and-go crew. Red Cedar Landscapes brings 41 years of Hudson Valley expertise, award-winning design, and certified arborists to every project — so your outdoor space becomes the place you never want to leave.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Comprehensive Landscape Services<br class="hidden md:block"> for Every Property
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the final planting, Red Cedar handles every phase of your outdoor project with master-level craftsmanship and Hudson Valley know-how.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Custom landscape architecture from our award-winning designer. From garden plans to full property transformations — tailored to Hudson Valley soil, climate, and your vision.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Masonry
cards.description: Patios, retaining walls, walkways, and driveways built by our in-house masons. Natural stone and brick craftsmanship that stands up to New York winters.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Outdoor kitchens, fire pits, pergolas, and entertainment areas designed for year-round Hudson Valley living. Your backyard becomes your favorite room.

cards.title: Land Clearing & Excavation
cards.description: Professional clearing, grading, and site prep for new construction or property improvement. Heavy equipment, careful operators, clean results.

cards.title: Commercial Maintenance
cards.description: Year-round commercial property care including mowing, fertilization, irrigation, and seasonal programs. We keep your business looking its best.

cards.title: Water Features & Drainage
cards.description: Custom ponds, fountains, and decorative water elements plus drainage solutions that protect your property from erosion and flooding.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Walk us through your property and share your vision. Our designer visits your site, listens to your goals, and provides an honest, detailed proposal — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build It Right
steps.description: Our award-winning designer creates your custom plan. Then our certified team of masons, arborists, and horticulturists brings it to life with craftsmanship that lasts decades.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Step outside into the property you always imagined. And with our ongoing maintenance programs, it stays beautiful season after season — so you just relax and enjoy.

about.label: Why Hudson Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: 41 Years of Roots in This Community
about.description: Steve Relyea founded Red Cedar Landscapes in 1985, right here in Wappingers Falls. Four decades later, we are still a family-run team of nine dedicated professionals — including an award-winning designer, certified arborists, skilled masons, and trained horticulturists. We have built our reputation one property at a time, earning an A+ BBB rating and the trust of homeowners and businesses across Dutchess County. When you hire Red Cedar, you get the owner on the phone and craftsmen on your property.

features.title: Award-Winning Design Team
features.description: Our on-staff landscape designer has earned regional recognition for creative, functional outdoor spaces that reflect each client's personality and property.

features.title: Certified Professionals Only
features.description: ISA Certified Arborists, Tree Safety Professionals, and experienced masons — every crew member brings verified expertise to your project.

features.title: A+ BBB Rating, 41 Years Running
features.description: We have maintained the highest Better Business Bureau rating for decades. No surprises, no shortcuts — just honest work at a fair price.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written proposal before work begins. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest numbers from a company that has been here 41 years.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any work we perform does not meet your expectations, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. We have spent 41 years building our reputation in this community, and we stand behind every stone we set, every tree we plant, and every wall we build. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my project?
faqs.answer: Most projects are scheduled within 2-4 weeks depending on scope and season. For urgent needs like storm damage cleanup or emergency tree work, we offer priority scheduling. Call us and we will give you an honest timeline.

faqs.question: Do you handle the full design-to-build process?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our award-winning designer creates the plan, and our in-house team of masons, arborists, and horticulturists builds it. One company, one point of contact, no subcontractor headaches.

faqs.question: Are your arborists actually certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. We have ISA Certified Arborists and a Certified Tree Safety Professional on staff. These are nationally recognized credentials that require ongoing education and testing. Your trees are in expert hands.

faqs.question: Do you work on commercial properties?
faqs.answer: We do. We manage commercial landscape maintenance for businesses throughout the Hudson Valley, including regular mowing, seasonal plantings, irrigation management, and snow preparation. We tailor programs to each property.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Wappingers Falls, Poughkeepsie, Beacon, Fishkill, Hyde Park, Rhinebeck, Hopewell Junction, Pleasant Valley, Red Hook, and communities throughout Dutchess County and the greater Hudson Valley.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Red Cedar is very professional, very reliable and easy to work with. They re-graded our backyard, built stone walls and were able to solve grading and slope challenges that other landscape architects could not.

testimonials.name: Local Resident
testimonials.text: I was extremely happy and impressed with the service, the workers, and the process. The workers were courteous, professional, creative, and did what they could to meet our needs at all times.

testimonials.name: Tree Service Customer
testimonials.text: They were on time and did great work. Very professional and outstanding customer service. They cut down our trees without damaging anything on the property, wood chipped on site, and removed all debris. Very clean and wonderful company.
